name: datavidence-healthanalysis
description: Domain plugin for biostatistics / health-data analysis (skills, governance hooks, reviewer subagents). Companion to datavidence-template-project.

plugins.name: datavidence-healthanalysis
plugins.description: Biostat / health-data domain: 22 thin-verb skills, 5 governance hooks (incl. pre-registration enforcement: sap_lock / attrition_log / variable_catalog_gate), 3 reviewer subagents. v0.2.0.
